sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (id UInt32, val Float64, event_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_quantiles (id, val, event_id) VALUES (1, 10.5, 1), (2, 20.2, 2), (3, 30.1, 1), (4, 40.4, 3);
UPDATE test_quantiles SET val = 15.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT quantileDeterministic(0.5)(val, event_id) FROM test_quantiles GROUP BY event_id;
